summary: Testing iteration 25 - Verified Session Mode feature, feature gating hook, promo code endpoint fix, and CampaignDashboard Session Mode button. 18/18 backend tests pass, 28/28 frontend tests pass.

breakdown.backend/test_subscription.py: 18 passed - 4-tier pricing verified, promo code endpoint, subscription status, checkout
breakdown.session-mode.spec.ts: 8 passed - Session Mode route, Initiative Tracker, Dice Roller, Session Notes, Conditions Reference
breakdown.feature-gating.spec.ts: 5 passed - CampaignDashboard Session Mode button, tab groups, GM Screen button, navigation

seed_data_creation: Tests use existing stress_test_1772651200@test.com user and TEST_CAMPAIGN_ID
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session Mode feature fully tested and working. Session Mode has: Initiative Tracker with add/remove combatants, Dice Roller (d4-d100 + ADV), Session Notes, Conditions Reference (Blinded, Prone, etc.). Feature gating via useSubscription hook is working - Session Mode requires 'session_mode' feature which is available in 'gm' and 'legendary' tiers. Promo code endpoint fix verified - PricingPage now calls /api/promo-codes/apply correctly.

session_mode_route.description: Route /campaign/:campaignId/session loads correctly with all components

session_mode_initiative_tracker.description: Initiative tracker with add combatant form, Start/Pause toggle, Next turn button

session_mode_dice_roller.description: Quick dice section with d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20, d100, ADV buttons and result display

session_mode_session_notes.description: Session notes section with input and save functionality

session_mode_conditions.description: Conditions reference showing D&D conditions like Blinded, Prone, etc.

campaign_dashboard_session_button.description: CampaignDashboard shows Session Mode button with lock/unlock icon based on tier

feature_gating_hook.description: useSubscription hook provides tier info and canAccess() function for feature gating

promo_code_endpoint_fix.description: PricingPage now calls /api/promo-codes/apply instead of wrong endpoint
